narrative:
Boardman Twp township has 28,516 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.3%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.1 percentage points.
